evals.prompt: Add a page to my App Builder SPA that shows a data table of products with sortable columns and pagination.
evals.expected_output: TableView component with sortable columns, async data loading from a backend action, proper Spectrum imports, loading state with ProgressCircle, empty state with IllustratedMessage, and fits existing project structure.

assertions.description: Creates a new React component file in the web-src components directory.
Uses React Spectrum TableView components for the data table.
Imports components from @adobe/react-spectrum.
Includes a loading state while data is being fetched.

evals.prompt: Create a form for submitting customer data in my App Builder app. It should have fields for name, email, company, and a department picker.
evals.expected_output: Form component with TextField for name/email/company, Picker for department, validation, submit handler that calls a backend action, error handling with InlineAlert, and loading state on submit button.

assertions.description: Creates a new React form component.
Uses React Spectrum Form components.
Includes form field validation.
Passes IMS token when calling the backend action.

evals.prompt: Set up the Experience Cloud Shell integration for my App Builder app.
evals.expected_output: @adobe/exc-app initialization with register(), runtime.done() to dismiss spinner, runtime.ready() to capture IMS context, Provider wrapper with defaultTheme and locale, and IMS token handling.

assertions.description: Initializes the Experience Cloud Shell with @adobe/exc-app register().
Calls runtime.done() to dismiss the shell loading spinner.
Captures IMS token and org from the shell context.
Wraps the app in a Spectrum Provider with defaultTheme.

evals.prompt: Add a confirmation dialog before deleting a record in my App Builder app's data table.
evals.expected_output: DialogTrigger wrapping an AlertDialog with confirm/cancel actions, delete handler that calls a backend action, proper dismiss handling, and destructive button styling.

assertions.description: Creates or updates a component file with the dialog.
Uses React Spectrum DialogTrigger and AlertDialog for the confirmation.
Includes a delete action handler on confirmation.
Uses destructive styling for the delete action.

evals.prompt: Build a Content Fragment Console extension with an action bar button that exports selected fragments as JSON.
evals.expected_output: AEM CF Console extension using @adobe/uix-guest with register() API, sharedContext for authentication, actionBar extension point registration, and a UI component that handles exporting selected content fragments.

assertions.description: Creates extension UI component file.
Uses @adobe/uix-guest for AEM extension registration.
Uses register() API for extension points.
Uses sharedContext for authentication.
Registers an action bar extension point.
